description: 边界情况: 空文件不崩溃、语法错误容错提取、纯类型文件无 calls 边

nodes.note: may or may not be extracted depending on error recovery

expectations.empty_file: produces 1 File node, 0 child nodes, no crash
expectations.syntax_error: tree-sitter produces partial AST with ERROR nodes; graph build succeeds with warning
expectations.pure_types: no calls/imports edges; only interface/enum nodes
